# Evidencias

## Testes executados
- [ ] Frontend lint (`cd frontend && npm run lint`)
- [ ] Frontend test (`cd frontend && npm run test`)
- [ ] Frontend build dev (`cd frontend && npm run build -- --configuration development`)
- [ ] Backend tests (`cd backend && pytest`)
- [ ] QA contrato/API (cite comando e resultado)
